feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG: How to make grey / non-editable any fields on UI ?
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

 

How to make any of the fields in UI (grey / non-editable) based on Field. 

Any Inputs or resources will be helpful.

 

Thank You, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: No Editions Avaliable on GL account crreation in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi,

Warning Message is Triggering "No Editions Avaliable"  on GL account crreation in SAP MDG. Anyone have idea and give solutions to avoid this message.  Provide me solution. Thanks in Advance to team.

Thanks&Regards,

ChiyaanRavi

entry.title: Import data for consolidation - products Error in file upload
entry.content:
I am using Import data for Consolidations - Products app . But when I upload the file i am getting error that "Loads exhibits no valid content " . I have done all checks and I am using the template file which is provided by SAP .

I also copied the content of file to Notepad++ and I see there is no problem - each line in excel is copied as separate line in Notepad++ .

Any hints on what is going wrong in this file upload as there is no clear description of error

entry.title: Validation of supplier in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I want to get the warning message for supplier if more than one bank account is added in bank accounts entity. But I'm getting warning message after entering Bank country/Region, Bank key of second bank account.

Please find below code for the same:

DATA : lv_row_index     TYPE i VALUE 0.


    cl_usmd_app_context=>get_context( )->get_attributes(
                  IMPORTING
                    ev_crequest_id = DATA(lv_cr_num6)                     "CR Number
                    ev_crequest_type  = DATA(lv_cr_type6)                 " Type of Change Request
                ).
    IF lv_cr_type6 = 'ZSUPP1' OR lv_cr_type6 = 'ZSUPP2'.

      IF id_entitytype = 'BP_BKDTL'.
        LOOP AT it_data ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
          IF <fs_data> IS ASSIGNED.
            lv_row_index = lv_row_index + 1.
          ENDIF.
          IF lv_row_index > 1.
            message-msgid = 'ZMDG'.
            message-msgty = 'W'.
            message-msgno = '008'.
            APPEND message TO et_message.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

Anyone please suggest which code changes should i need to do for getting warning message without entering Bank country/region, bank key for second bank details id.

entry.title: Dynamic Agent (Parallel) Keeping Approver on Hold
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Need your help to build a code when requestor enter sales org, tax and finance it should be routed to all 3 approver ((Parallel) - finance / sales approver approved it and tax approver send for revision it, here it should go to requestor and requestor resubmit which is common requirement.

But here we want, When requestor resubmit it should only go to tax approver who send for revision not to finance/sales for approver because they already approved it and once tax approver approved it should trigger MERGE BADI (Parallel BADI). Somewhere we need to keep finance/sales approver keep on hold because it is already completed action and once tax approver approved it should trigger MERGE BADI (Parallel BADI).

entry.title: Change document not showing latest CR for business partner in 'Display change document' in SAP MDG.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

User has created one CR which is final check approved with some changes in business partner. But it's not showing under 'Display change document' on NWBC for that business partner. If we open the change request and then go to the change document, we are able to see the change log. What could be the reason behind this?

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Mass update of BSEG/STCEG?
entry.content:
Hello, is there a way to mass update missing VAT IDs on SD documents - BSEG/STCEG?

THank you!

entry.title: Activate change pointer for alternative CCH
entry.content:
Hi Guru, 

I hope you are are all doing well. 

may i request for your expertise and help on this topic : 

I would like to activate change pointer for alternative cost center hierarchy.

now we are able to fill BDCP2 with idoc COGRP1 but only when we update the standard hierarchy. not nothing happened when we update the alternative hierarchy. 

The point is that we would like to have automatic transport of the Alt CCH each time it is updated.  

All custo has been done as we can manage standard hierarchy. 

Please note that your help would be very well appreciate. 

Thank you in advance.  

Regardes 

Lelo.

entry.title: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirmation message
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a question or an issue with Business Partner distribution. We would like to disable the confirmation message to reduce the message load. I have deactivated the corresponding services on the receiver side.

BUSINESSPARTNERSUITEBULKREPLI1

BUSINESSPARTNERRELATIONSHIPSU1

Now we receive the following error on the receiver side: "Error creating the confirmation message: ABAP.PRX_PROTO_NOT_SUPPORTED Proxy protocol for K"

Is it really necessary to enable the confirmation message? Or do you know a way to disable the message?

Thank you in advance,

Stefan

entry.title: Transaction for MDG Requests in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hello!

I’d like to know if there’s a transaction that I can execute in SAP GUI client to see, modify, approve, reject or attach files to a Change Request that I see on MDG web client.

I’m working with the maintenance of Business Partners using MDG. There, different Change Requests are created from our stakeholders to update or create Business Partners information. I’d like to know if there’s a way to attach files to a Change Request WITHOUT using MDG. One option would be attaching the files directly to a Change Request using the SAP GUI client and not the MDG web client.

Can you help me with my use case? I need some guidance on how can I achieve that.

Thank you!

entry.title: MDG: How to adjust our custom code for note 2934693.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'd like to know which methods have to be adjusted for changes in note 2934693.

I followed the SAP MDG how-to guides for enhancing the data model (SAP How-To Guide_ Extend the MDG Business Partner-Node Extension (Reuse Option)).
To adapt changes in Note 2934694, I adjusted IF_MDG_BS_BP_ACCESS_HANDLER~READ_OBJECT_DATA according to the guide in this note.
Display BP works fine, but when changing to Edit mode, data was displayed incorrectly. 
Which methods should I change exactly?

Thank you
Yuko

entry.title: SAP MDG: It is not possible to modify webdynpro settings.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

In SAP MDG It is not permitted to modify a functionality configuration in webdynpro.

When I try to click on the tool to change the settings, it goes to the end of the page and does not give access to the settings.

These functionalities are frozen even when typing on the tool.

I can´t change any window in the TECHNICAL_SECTION.

I really appreciate any help.

Regards,

Rodrigo Maffini

entry.title: Unable to extend MDC Model
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need to extend standard tables ISJPNAYOSE and ISJPHIERARCHY in MDC model for BP(147).

I tried to extend MDC model by following the steps in the following How-To guide and the blog, but the table items are not synchronized even when I press the "Synchronize fields" button.

SAP How-To Guide: Node (Table) Extension for Business Partner in MDG Consolidation and Mass Processing https://www.sap.com/documents/2017/08/18cfbb67-cd7c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Standard Table Addition in MDC

The message "No entries found that match the selection criteria" appears.

Could anyone please let me know where I am going wrong or If I am missing something?

entry.title: Where do I add a new object type to be viewed and added in IE01?Is it related to Class config?
entry.content:
I need to add a new object type which is to be used in IE01, object type field. I am unable to find the configuration of it.

Is it related to class configuration? I tried it in SPRO but I am unable to get to the page where I can add a new object type.

Also, is there a table where I can see the existing object types?

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Overall Equipment Effectiveness Management PLM Classification SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: how to display error message for choosing incorrect CR type?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on some task.

When user selects a material, clicks on copy , Change request pop will come. If an incorrect CR type is selected , how to display error message on the screen?

Kindly provide some inputs on how this can be achieved.

 

 

error message (incorrect CR type)to be displayed here in yellow section?

 

 

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: How to create a PIR with different unit and scale?
entry.content:
The supplier sent us this quotation. How could we set up the PIR and update the quotation for FG to the customer when we quote on a unit piece?

 

Price

1-20pcs : 1.632.540/LOT

21-50 pcs : 51.815/pc

51-120pcs : 44.954/pc

entry.title: Copy Version Master Data from Baseline to MD Specific Version with Advanced Filter
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to do a Copy Version for Master Data, from Baseline version to a Master Data Specific Version, using an advanced filter. 

  • the MD that I'm trying to copy, has on key attributes: Product ID (key for MD Product), Location ID (key for MD Location) and another attribute called Source ID;
  • this is a Simple MD;
  • I'm trying to use a filter related to MD Product: Product Type; so I would like to copy only certain records that meet this requirement for Product IDs;

The Output is Master data type ZPTSOURCEPRODUCTION is not copied because of the incompatible filter. 

Thanks all for your time

entry.title: SAP ERROR MESSAGE M3332
entry.content:
Hi, I can't create a material because of this message. How can i solve it? My alternative UoM is not the same as base UoM.

Diagnosis

You have entered an alternative unit of measure that is the same as the base unit of measure. These units must be different.

Procedure

Only enter an alternative unit of measure if it differs from the base unit of measure. Otherwise, leave this field blank.

entry.title: How do we restrict the user assignments in SAP MDG Substitution? Do we have any enhancement option?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement in the SAP MDG CR approval process that the requestor should never be able to approve the change request even if he/she is part of the approval group. We have achieved this by implementing the MDG Agent determination BAdI. 

However, this does not fulfill the requirement 100%. Because, our customer uses the "Workflow Substitution" feature extensively in order to substitute another user to act on the change request actions during the vacation period etc. 

When we use the Workflow substitution, there is a possibility that the rule gets violated if the requestor is acting as substitution for the approver. 

So, do have any standard way of handling this requirement in the Workflow substitution or any standard enhancement option like BAdI in the Substitution?

Any input or information is very much appreciated.

entry.title: Adding BP roles via Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm currently trying to add some roles for several BP's (so adding massively), that are already in the system. 

Which objects, in the migration cockpit, should I use to proceed with that ?
